publishedAbstract: The customer is experiencing intermittent S3 upload failures (HTTP 500 / InternalError) when uploading files to NooBaa buckets via JFrog Artifactory. The issue is characterized by PostgreSQL unique constraint violations in the noobaa-db and TypeError crashes in noobaa-core. Key Error Snippets:- Artifactory Logs: org.jfrog.type.s3.exception.S3ServiceException: We encountered an internal error. Please try again. (Service: Amazon S3; Status Code: 500; Error Code: InternalError)- NooBaa Endpoint Logs: Error: complete_object_upload_latest_mark_remove_current_and_delete: partial bulk update... Key ((data-> > 'bucket'::text), (data-> > 'key'::text))=(...) already exists.- NooBaa Core Logs: core.server.bg_services.agent_blocks_reclaimer:: AGENT_BLOCKS_RECLAIMER: ERROR TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'frags')- Postgres Logs: LONG QUERY (OVER 5000 ms)... SELECT... FROM objectmds WHERE (data-> 'deleted' <'...').
publishedTitle: Intermittent S3 upload failures (HTTP 500/InternalError) when uploading files to NooBaa buckets via JFrog Artifactory
